entity.label: Jedaiah
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: One of those who repaired the walls of Jerusalem after the return from Babylon (Neh. 3:10).

nodes.label: Jedaiah
nodes.description: One of those who repaired the walls of Jerusalem after the return from Babylon (Neh. 3:10).

verses.text: And next unto them repaired Jedaiah the son of Harumaph, even over against his house. And next unto him repaired Hattush the son of Hashabniah.
